news.title: U.S. payrolls unexpectedly fell by 92,000 in February; unemployment rate rises to 4.4%
news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase 50,000 in February. The unemployment rate held steady at 4.3%. The economy is expected to grow by 0.3% in the first quarter.

news.title: WTI crude tops $86, hits highest level since April 2024, Brent crude breaks above $89 a barrel
news.summary: The oil market is worried that Gulf countries will have to shut production if tankers are unable to pass the the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Trump wants U.S. Navy to escort tankers through the Gulf. Why that plan may not work
news.summary: A backup of oil tankers in the Persian Gulf is disrupting supplies, and will only get worse the longer the Strait of Hormuz is closed.

news.title: Samsung reveals first details of its AI smart glasses to CNBC
news.summary: Samsung's AI smart glasses will be launched in 2026. It will mark the company's first foray into the product category. The glasses are expected to cost around $1,000.

news.title: Here's how the U.S.-Iran war is already hitting consumers' pocketbooks
news.summary: U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran over the weekend gave way to a week with topsy-turvy markets, spiking mortgage rates and higher prices at the pump.

news.title: The ‘everybody loses’ scenario: Why the Iran conflict is breaking this classic portfolio strategy
